meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template to Scale Apps
content.seo_description: Break through your coding plateau. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build professional-grade SaaS applications today.
content.answer_block: Stop building 'to-do' lists and start shipping production-ready SaaS. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you gain a pre-configured architecture that handles authentication, database scaling, and API integration. When paired with Claude Code, you automate the boilerplate, allowing you to focus on high-value business logic and complex feature engineering.
content.intro:
You have mastered the syntax, passed the tutorials, and built your fair share of static web pages. Yet, every time you stare at a blank IDE, you feel the crushing weight of the 'beginner's plateau'—that invisible wall where your ambition exceeds your architecture. You know how to code, but you don't know how to build a system that breathes, scales, and delivers real value.

This is the threshold between a student and a software engineer. The Antigravity project template isn't just a starter kit; it is a battle-hardened scaffolding designed to bypass the drudgery of setup. Combined with the surgical precision of Claude Code, you can now transcend basic scripts and deploy architectural foundations that rival professional SaaS products.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Architecture
steps.description: Establish a production-grade foundation by cloning the Antigravity template to ensure your environment is pre-configured with secure middleware and type safety.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the standard Antigravity enterprise template with TypeScript and PostgreSQL support.

steps.title: Define Domain-Driven Models
steps.description: Shift from simple data types to robust domain models. Use this step to map your business logic before writing a single line of UI code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a domain model for a SaaS user profile, including subscription tiers and audit logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file models/user.ts --prompt 'Define interface with Zod validation schema'

steps.title: Implement Type-Safe API Routes
steps.description: Connect your frontend to the backend using Antigravity’s built-in RPC patterns, eliminating the need for manual endpoint management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a type-safe API route that handles user authentication and updates the subscription status in the database.

steps.title: Automate Integration Testing
steps.description: Ensure your app doesn't break when you scale. Claude Code will write unit and integration tests based on your Antigravity controllers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of integration tests for the authentication workflow using Vitest.

steps.title: Deploy to Production Infrastructure
steps.description: Finalize your build pipeline. Antigravity provides the CI/CD scripts necessary to push your project to a live environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment pipeline for Vercel and set up environment variable injection.

pro_tips: Always use Zod schemas for runtime validation; it prevents 90% of production data corruption bugs.
Treat your configuration files as code; keep them versioned and use Claude to explain complex environment variable dependencies.
Implement 'Feature Flags' early in the Antigravity template to test new features without breaking the main branch.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write it; it forces you to clarify your architectural intent.
Focus on 'Database First' development; if your schema is clean, the UI becomes trivial to implement.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, iterate by adding a payment gateway like Stripe and monitoring your logs via the Antigravity dashboard to understand real-world usage patterns.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the blueprint to move beyond tutorials. The only missing variable is your consistency in execution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
